---
title: "callingcards_explorer"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(reticulate)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(RColorBrewer)

venv_path = here(".venv")

# virtualenv_create(venv_path)
# virtualenv_install(
#   envname = venv_path,
#   packages = character(0),
#   pip_options = c("-e", "/home/chase/code/tfbp/tfbpapi")
# )
# virtualenv_install(venv_path,
#                    packages = "-e /home/chase/code/tfbpmodeling")
# packages = c("git+https://github.com/cmatKhan/tfbpmodeling.git@lassocv_sequential_rewrite")

use_virtualenv(venv_path, required = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(arrow)

orig_af = list(
    af = 
        arrow::open_dataset("~/code/hf/callingcards/annotated_features") %>%
        collect() %>%
        left_join(arrow::read_parquet(
            "~/code/hf/callingcards/annotated_features_meta.parquet")),
    combined =
        arrow::open_dataset("~/code/hf/callingcards/annotated_features_combined") %>%
        collect() %>%
        left_join(arrow::read_parquet(
            "~/code/hf/callingcards/annotated_features_combined_meta.parquet")),
    repro =
        arrow::open_dataset("~/code/hf/callingcards/annotated_features_orig_reprocess") %>%
        collect() %>%
        left_join(arrow::read_parquet("~/code/hf/callingcards/genome_map_meta.parquet"))
)


```
